interpretation: F|_{(A1)^6} * conj(F|_{(A1)^6}) = ||F|_{(A1)^6}||^2 * e0 confirmed. This is the sedenion alternative-law identity restricted to the subspace. Non-scalar parts vanish to machine precision — the (A1)^6 projection inherits the full-sedenion self-dual property. Srednicki analogue: norm preservation under the 'Fourier transform' (bilateral annihilation map).
